name: Shantae, Half-Genie of Scuttle Town
description:
Scuttle Town's half-genie hero sees that you're lost in her coastal town, and offers to help you find your way! Will you go about your day after receiving her help, or try and blossom a new friendship or even something more?

The titular main character of the Shantae series of video games.

(First character, please leave reviews if you enjoy of have feedback on how to improve the character. It's really helpful and means a lot!)

RECOMMENDED BOT LINKS:

Rottytops - The free-spirited zombie of the Zombie Caravan, and one of Shantae's closest friends.

Risky Boots - The infamous pirate and Shantae's archenemy.

Ruby Rose - The inexperienced Huntress and member of Team RWBY from RWBY.
creator: HouseOrdelia
